member.name: T:UrlShortener.Domain.Common.Entity`1
member.summary: Base class for all domain entities. Provides a strongly typed identifier for each entity.

member.name: P:UrlShortener.Domain.Common.Entity`1.Id
member.summary: Gets the unique identifier of the entity.

member.name: M:UrlShortener.Domain.Common.Entity`1.#ctor
member.summary: Required by Entity Framework Core for materialization.

member.name: M:UrlShortener.Domain.Common.Entity`1.#ctor(`0)
member.summary: Initializes a new entity with the specified identifier.
member.param: The unique identifier of the entity.

member.name: T:UrlShortener.Domain.Common.ValueObject
member.summary: Base class for value objects. Value objects are compared by their values instead of object references.

member.name: M:UrlShortener.Domain.Common.ValueObject.GetEqualityComponents
member.summary: Gets the components that are used to compare value objects.

member.name: M:UrlShortener.Domain.Common.ValueObject.Equals(System.Object)
member.summary: Determines whether the current value object is equal to another object.
member.returns: True if objects are equal; otherwise, false.

member.name: M:UrlShortener.Domain.Common.ValueObject.op_Equality(UrlShortener.Domain.Common.ValueObject,UrlShortener.Domain.Common.ValueObject)
member.summary: Compares two value objects for equality.

member.name: M:UrlShortener.Domain.Common.ValueObject.op_Inequality(UrlShortener.Domain.Common.ValueObject,UrlShortener.Domain.Common.ValueObject)
member.summary: Compares two value objects for inequality.

member.name: M:UrlShortener.Domain.Common.ValueObject.GetHashCode
member.summary: Gets the hash code based on value object equality components.

member.name: T:UrlShortener.Domain.UrlAggregate.Entity.Url
member.summary: Represents a shortened URL in the domain model. Contains the original long URL, generated short code and creation date.

member.name: P:UrlShortener.Domain.UrlAggregate.Entity.Url.LongUrl
member.summary: Gets the original long URL provided by the user.

member.name: P:UrlShortener.Domain.UrlAggregate.Entity.Url.Code
member.summary: Gets the generated short code used for redirection.

member.name: P:UrlShortener.Domain.UrlAggregate.Entity.Url.CreatedAt
member.summary: Gets the date and time when the URL was created.

member.name: M:UrlShortener.Domain.UrlAggregate.Entity.Url.#ctor(UrlShortener.Domain.UrlAggregate.ValueObjects.UrlId,System.String,System.String,System.DateTime)
member.summary: Required by Entity Framework Core.

member.name: M:UrlShortener.Domain.UrlAggregate.Entity.Url.SetCode(System.String)
member.summary: Sets the generated short code for this URL.

member.name: M:UrlShortener.Domain.UrlAggregate.Entity.Url.Create(System.String)
member.summary: Creates a new URL entity with a unique identifier and empty code. The short code is generated later by the application layer.

member.name: T:UrlShortener.Domain.UrlAggregate.ValueObjects.UrlId
member.summary: Strongly typed identifier for the Url entity. Wraps a Guid value and provides value-based equality.

member.name: P:UrlShortener.Domain.UrlAggregate.ValueObjects.UrlId.Value
member.summary: Gets the underlying Guid value.

member.name: M:UrlShortener.Domain.UrlAggregate.ValueObjects.UrlId.CreateUnique
member.summary: Creates a new unique UrlId.
member.returns: New UrlId instance with a generated Guid.

member.name: M:UrlShortener.Domain.UrlAggregate.ValueObjects.UrlId.Create(System.Guid)
member.summary: Creates a UrlId from an existing Guid value. Used when restoring entities from the database.

member.name: T:UrlShortener.Domain.UserAggregate.Entity.User
member.summary: Represents an application user. Stores user identity data and password hash.

member.name: P:UrlShortener.Domain.UserAggregate.Entity.User.Login
member.summary: Gets the user login.

member.name: P:UrlShortener.Domain.UserAggregate.Entity.User.Email
member.summary: Gets the user email address.

member.name: P:UrlShortener.Domain.UserAggregate.Entity.User.PasswordHash
member.summary: Gets the hashed user password. Plain passwords are not stored in the database.

member.name: M:UrlShortener.Domain.UserAggregate.Entity.User.#ctor(UrlShortener.Domain.UserAggregate.ValueObjects.UserId,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Required by Entity Framework Core.

member.name: M:UrlShortener.Domain.UserAggregate.Entity.User.Create(System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Creates a new user with a unique identifier.

member.name: T:UrlShortener.Domain.UserAggregate.ValueObjects.UserId
member.summary: Strongly typed identifier for the User entity. Wraps a Guid value and provides value-based equality.

member.name: P:UrlShortener.Domain.UserAggregate.ValueObjects.UserId.Value
member.summary: Gets the underlying Guid value.

member.name: M:UrlShortener.Domain.UserAggregate.ValueObjects.UserId.CreateUnique
member.summary: Creates a new unique UserId.
member.returns: New UserId instance with a generated Guid.

member.name: M:UrlShortener.Domain.UserAggregate.ValueObjects.UserId.Create(System.Guid)
member.summary: Creates a UserId from an existing Guid value. Used when restoring entities from the database.
